subcodes.first_line: O thou who art mentioned before the Wronged One! Verily, the Most Exalted Pen hath willed to reveal unto thee the pearls of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المذکور لدی المظلوم ان قلمی الاعلی اراد ان یظهر لک لئالی الحکمه
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
